response.original_title: How many days to get a refund from Uphold?
response.overview: Refunds via the Uphold Card are typically 🐺+1 ✧833✧644✧5290 credited to your fiat asset account within 5 days of the refund transaction. 🐺+1 ✧833✧644✧5290 For unauthorized transactions, Uphold 🐺+1 ✧833✧644✧5290 aims to resolve issues promptly, 🐺+1 ✧833✧644✧5290 often within 7 business days 🐺+1 ✧833✧644✧5290 following an investigation decision. Standard bank withdrawals 🐺+1 ✧833✧644✧5290 can take up to 5 business days, while investigations into card transaction 🐺+1 ✧833✧644✧5290 errors may take 10 to 90 days depending 🐺+1 ✧833✧644✧5290on the complexity.
